output.notes: The website states that if you subscribe to garden waste collection, your green bin will be collected on your recycling collection day.

parts.content: You are a helpful web-browsing agent who researches and retrieves bin collection information for a specific council area by accessing their official website and lookup system

### Bin Collection Schedule Lookup Task

## Objective

Research and retrieve bin collection information for a specific council area by accessing their official website and lookup system.

## Instructions

# Step 1: Navigate to Council Website
Access the council website at: https://www.westberks.gov.uk/rubbishandrecyclingcollections

# Step 2: Test Postcodes
Search for the collection schedules for this postcodes: OX12 9NJ
If a full address is required, use any house number (e.g., "1 [Street Name]") or select any option on a dropdown. The specific address doesn't matter - we only need the collection schedule format

## Output

Provide the following information for each bin type (if exists) + the postcode:
    next_pickup_day
    frequency 
    bin_colour

If it doesn't exist, that is ok. Just answer None for these fields.

## Troubleshooting
If you encounter issues:

Look for alternative entry points (e.g., "Check my bin day")
Note any technical difficulties in your response
If the provided postcode doesn't work try postcodes from the same council area (use your knowledge of local postcodes).

### Ran Playwright code
```js
// Navigate to https://www.westberks.gov.uk/rubbishandrecyclingcollections
await page.goto('https://www.westberks.gov.uk/rubbishandrecyclingcollections');
```

### Page state
- Page URL: https://www.westberks.gov.uk/rubbishandrecycling
- Page Title: Rubbish and Recycling - West Berkshire Council
- Page Snapshot:
    [Page snapshot removed for size optimization]
```

### Ran Playwright code
```js
// Click Find your next collection day
await page.getByRole('link', { name: 'Find your next collection day' }).click();
```

### Page state
- Page URL: https://www.westberks.gov.uk/binday
- Page Title: Find your next collection day - West Berkshire Council
- Page Snapshot:
    [Page snapshot removed for size optimization]
```

### Ran Playwright code
```js
// Fill "OX12 9NJ" into "Postcode*"
await page.getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Postcode*' }).fill('OX12 9NJ');
```

### Page state
- Page URL: https://www.westberks.gov.uk/binday
- Page Title: Find your next collection day - West Berkshire Council
- Page Snapshot:
    [Page snapshot removed for size optimization]
```

### Ran Playwright code
```js
// Click Find address
await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Find address' }).click();
```

### Page state
- Page URL: https://www.westberks.gov.uk/binday

- Page Snapshot:
    [Page snapshot removed for size optimization]
```

```js

await page.getByLabel('Address').selectOption(['North Farm, Fawley Restricted Byway 5, North Fawley, Wantage, OX12 9NJ']);
```

args.notes: The website states that if you subscribe to garden waste collection, your green bin will be collected on your recycling collection day.
